---
title: "DMP Signature Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
    df_print: paged
params:
  data_path: "data.rds"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 8,
  dpi = 100
)

# Load required libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(chromoMap)
library(heatmaply)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)

# Load report data
report_data <- readRDS(params$data_path)

# Extract data
signature_name  <- report_data$signature_name
dmp_full        <- report_data$dmp_full
dmp_sig         <- report_data$dmp_sig
full_annotation <- report_data$full_annotation
beta_matrix     <- report_data$beta_matrix
pheno           <- report_data$pheno
ages            <- report_data$ages           # <--- NOUVEAU : Récupération Ages
adjPVal         <- report_data$adjPVal
top_n_heatmap   <- report_data$top_n_heatmap
top_n_windows   <- report_data$top_n_windows

# --- DATA CLEANING (Alignement UI) ---
# S'assurer que P.Value existe (Fallback sur adj.P.Val ou P.Val si manquant)
if(!"P.Value" %in% colnames(dmp_sig)) {
  if("P.Val" %in% colnames(dmp_sig)) dmp_sig$P.Value <- dmp_sig$P.Val
  else dmp_sig$P.Value <- dmp_sig$adj.P.Val
}
if(!"P.Value" %in% colnames(dmp_full)) {
  if("P.Val" %in% colnames(dmp_full)) dmp_full$P.Value <- dmp_full$P.Val
  else dmp_full$P.Value <- dmp_full$adj.P.Val
}

# Subsets pour compatibilité
dmp_hyper <- dmp_sig %>% filter(Status == "Hyper")
dmp_hypo  <- dmp_sig %>% filter(Status == "Hypo")
```

---

# DMP Signature Report: `r signature_name`

# Summary Statistics

```{r summary_stats}
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Category = c("Total Probes Tested", 
               "Significant DMPs", 
               "Hyper-Methylated DMPs", 
               "Hypo-Methylated DMPs"),
  Count = c(nrow(dmp_full), 
            nrow(dmp_sig), 
            nrow(dmp_hyper), 
            nrow(dmp_hypo)),
  Percentage = c("100%",
                 paste0(round(100 * nrow(dmp_sig) / nrow(dmp_full), 2), "%"),
                 paste0(round(100 * nrow(dmp_hyper) / nrow(dmp_full), 2), "%"),
                 paste0(round(100 * nrow(dmp_hypo) / nrow(dmp_full), 2), "%"))
)

kable(summary_df, caption = paste("Summary (adj.P.Val <", adjPVal, ")"))
```

## DMP Results Table

```{r dmp_table}
# Prepare columns like in UI (Ajout de P.Value)
cols_base <- c("CpG", "deltaBeta", "adj.P.Val", "P.Value", "CHR", "MAPINFO", "gene", "feature", "CGI")
dmp_display <- dmp_sig %>% select(any_of(cols_base))

# Séparation des colonnes pour le formatage
cols_pvals <- c('adj.P.Val', 'P.Value')
cols_betas <- c('deltaBeta')

DT::datatable(
  dmp_display,
  caption = "Significant Differentially Methylated Positions",
  filter = 'top',
  extensions = 'Buttons',
  options = list(
    scrollX = TRUE,
    pageLength = 25,
    dom = 'Bfrtip',
    buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel'),
    order = list(list(which(colnames(dmp_display) == "adj.P.Val"), 'asc'))
  ),
  rownames = FALSE
) %>%
  # Formatage spécifique : Betas (arrondi), P-values (significatifs)
  DT::formatRound(columns = cols_betas, digits = 4) %>%
  DT::formatSignif(columns = cols_pvals, digits = 3) %>%
  DT::formatStyle('deltaBeta', 
                  color = DT::styleInterval(0, c('blue', 'red')), 
                  fontWeight = 'bold')
```

---

## Volcano Plot & Density

```{r volcano_density, fig.height=6}
# Recalcul Status sur le Full dataset pour le plot
# Note: On utilise adjPVal comme seuil principal ici pour la couleur
dmp_full$Status <- case_when(
  dmp_full$adj.P.Val < adjPVal & dmp_full$deltaBeta > 0 ~ "Hyper",
  dmp_full$adj.P.Val < adjPVal & dmp_full$deltaBeta < 0 ~ "Hypo",
  TRUE ~ "Not Sig"
)

# Sample non-significant for performance
df_viz <- bind_rows(
  dmp_full %>% filter(Status != "Not Sig"),
  dmp_full %>% filter(Status == "Not Sig") %>% sample_n(min(nrow(.), 5000))
)

# Volcano Plot (Ajout P.Value au tooltip)
p_volcano <- plot_ly(
  data = df_viz,
  x = ~deltaBeta,
  y = ~-log10(adj.P.Val),
  type = 'scatter',
  mode = 'markers',
  color = ~Status,
  colors = c("Hyper" = "#d9534f", "Hypo" = "#0275d8", "Not Sig" = "grey"),
  text = ~paste("Gene:", gene, 
                "<br>CpG:", CpG, 
                "<br>Adj.P:", formatC(adj.P.Val, format = "e", digits = 2),
                "<br>Raw.P:", formatC(P.Value, format = "e", digits = 2)),
  marker = list(size = 5, opacity = 0.7)
) %>%
  layout(
    title = "Volcano Plot",
    xaxis = list(title = "Delta Beta"),
    yaxis = list(title = "-log10(adj.P.Val)")
  )

# Density Plot
df_density <- dmp_full %>% filter(Status != "Not Sig")
p_density <- ggplot(df_density, aes(x = deltaBeta, fill = Status)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Hyper" = "#d9534f", "Hypo" = "#0275d8")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Delta Beta Density", x = "Delta Beta", y = "Density")

# Display side by side
htmltools::div(
  style = "display: flex; gap: 20px;",
  htmltools::div(style = "flex: 1;", p_volcano),
  htmltools::div(style = "flex: 1;", ggplotly(p_density))
)
```

---

## Chromosomes Map (ChromoMap)

```{r chromomap, fig.height=8}
# Prepare chromosome reference (HG38)
chr_ref <- data.frame(
  chrom = c(paste0("chr", 1:22), "chrX", "chrY"),
  start = 1,
  end = c(248956422, 242193529, 198295559, 190214555, 181538259, 170805979, 159345973,
          145138636, 138394717, 133797422, 135086622, 133275309, 114364328, 107043718,
          101991189, 90338345, 83257441, 80373285, 58617616, 64444167, 46709983,
          50818468, 156040895, 57227415)
)

# Prepare annotation data (Only Sig DMPs)
dmp_sig$CHR_Clean <- paste0("chr", gsub("chr", "", dmp_sig$CHR))
df_map <- dmp_sig %>% filter(CHR_Clean %in% chr_ref$chrom)

if (nrow(df_map) > 0) {
  annot_data <- data.frame(
    Element = df_map$CpG,
    Chrom   = as.character(df_map$CHR_Clean),
    Start   = as.numeric(df_map$MAPINFO),
    End     = as.numeric(df_map$MAPINFO + 1),
    Data    = as.numeric(df_map$deltaBeta),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  annot_data <- na.omit(annot_data)
  
  chromoMap(
    list(chr_ref),
    list(annot_data),
    data_based_color_map = TRUE,
    data_type = "numeric",
    data_colors = list(c("blue", "white", "red")),
    chr_color = c("#d3d3d3"),
    legend = TRUE,
    lg_x = 100,
    lg_y = 100
  )
} else {
  cat("No chromosomal data available for mapping.\n")
}
```

---

## Distribution Barplots

### CGI Distribution

```{r barplot_cgi, fig.height=5}
# Prepare data with "All" category like in UI
df_hyper_all <- dmp_hyper; df_hyper_all$Status <- "Hyper"
df_hypo_all <- dmp_hypo; df_hypo_all$Status <- "Hypo"
df_all <- dmp_sig; df_all$Status <- "All"

df_combined <- bind_rows(df_hyper_all, df_hypo_all, df_all)
df_combined$Status <- factor(df_combined$Status, levels = c("Hyper", "Hypo", "All"))

p_cgi <- ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = CGI, fill = Status)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Hyper" = "#d9534f", "Hypo" = "#0275d8", "All" = "#555555")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution by CGI Context", x = "CGI", y = "Count") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplotly(p_cgi)
```

### Feature Distribution

```{r barplot_feature, fig.height=5}
# Order features like in UI
feat_levels <- c("TSS1500", "TSS200", "5'UTR", "1stExon", "Body", "3'UTR", "IGR")
present <- intersect(feat_levels, unique(df_combined$feature))
others <- setdiff(unique(df_combined$feature), feat_levels)
df_combined$feature <- factor(df_combined$feature, levels = c(present, others))

p_feature <- ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = feature, fill = Status)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Hyper" = "#d9534f", "Hypo" = "#0275d8", "All" = "#555555")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution by Genomic Feature", x = "Feature", y = "Count") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplotly(p_feature)
```

### Chromosomal Distribution

```{r barplot_chr, fig.height=5}
# Clean chromosome names
df_combined$CHR_Clean <- gsub("chr", "", df_combined$CHR)
chr_levels <- c(as.character(1:22), "X", "Y", "M", "MT")
df_combined$CHR_Factor <- factor(df_combined$CHR_Clean, levels = chr_levels)

df_chr <- df_combined %>% filter(!is.na(CHR_Factor))

p_chr <- ggplot(df_chr, aes(x = CHR_Factor, fill = Status)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Hyper" = "#d9534f", "Hypo" = "#0275d8", "All" = "#555555")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution by Chromosome", x = "Chromosome", y = "Count") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplotly(p_chr)
```

### Feature × CGI Composition

```{r barplot_feature_cgi, fig.height=6}
p_feat_cgi <- ggplot(dmp_sig, aes(x = feature, fill = CGI)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  facet_wrap(~Status) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "CGI Composition within Features (by Status)", x = "Feature", y = "Proportion") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplotly(p_feat_cgi)
```

---

## Heatmap of Top DMPs

```{r heatmap, fig.height=10}
# Select top DMPs by absolute delta beta
dmp_sorted <- dmp_sig[order(abs(dmp_sig$deltaBeta), decreasing = TRUE), ]
top_cpgs <- head(dmp_sorted$CpG, min(top_n_heatmap, nrow(dmp_sorted)))

# Extract beta values
beta_heatmap <- beta_matrix[top_cpgs, , drop = FALSE]

if (nrow(beta_heatmap) >= 2) {
  # Prepare annotation for samples
  pheno_df <- data.frame(Group = pheno)
  rownames(pheno_df) <- colnames(beta_heatmap)
  
  # Generate heatmap with heatmaply (same as UI)
  heatmaply::heatmaply(
    beta_heatmap,
    limits = c(0, 1),
    colors = colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick"))(100),
    row_dend_left = TRUE,
    col_dend_top = TRUE,
    branches_lwd = 0.2,
    labRow = if(length(top_cpgs) > 50) NULL else top_cpgs,
    labCol = colnames(beta_heatmap),
    main = paste("Clustering (", length(top_cpgs), "DMPs)")
  )
} else {
  cat("Not enough CpGs for heatmap clustering.\n")
}
```

---

## Individual CpG Windows (Genomic Curves)

```{r cpg_windows, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
# --- PARAMÈTRES UI-LIKE ---
window_bp <- 5000 

# 1. RÉCUPÉRATION DE L'ANNOTATION COMPLÈTE (passed via report_data)
# C'est la différence clé : on utilise l'annotation complète, pas juste les résultats DMPs
probe_features <- report_data$full_annotation 
beta_matrix    <- report_data$beta_matrix
dmp_sig        <- report_data$dmp_sig

# 2. NETTOYAGE PRÉALABLE (Copie exacte de la logique UI)
# Force MAPINFO en numérique
if("MAPINFO" %in% colnames(probe_features)) {
  probe_features$MAPINFO <- as.numeric(as.character(probe_features$MAPINFO))
}
# Création/Nettoyage de CHR_Clean
chr_col <- grep("CHR", colnames(probe_features), ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)[1]
if(!is.na(chr_col)) {
  probe_features$CHR_Clean <- gsub("chr", "", as.character(probe_features[[chr_col]]), ignore.case = TRUE)
}
# Si CpG n'est pas une colonne
if(!"CpG" %in% colnames(probe_features)) {
  probe_features$CpG <- rownames(probe_features)
}

# 3. SÉLECTION DES CIBLES
# On prend les X meilleurs DMPs significatifs
dmp_sorted <- dmp_sig[order(dmp_sig$adj.P.Val), ]
top_window_cpgs <- head(dmp_sorted$CpG, min(top_n_windows, nrow(dmp_sorted)))

plot_list <- list()

for (i in seq_along(top_window_cpgs)) {
  target_id <- top_window_cpgs[i]
  
  # --- A. Infos de la cible (Depuis l'annotation complète) ---
  # UI Logic: info <- probe_features[target_id, ]
  sel_info <- probe_features[probe_features$CpG == target_id, ]
  
  if (nrow(sel_info) == 0) next
  
  # Récupération propre
  target_chr  <- as.character(sel_info$CHR_Clean[1])
  target_pos  <- as.numeric(sel_info$MAPINFO[1])
  target_gene <- if("gene" %in% colnames(sel_info)) sel_info$gene[1] else ""
  
  # Fenêtre
  w_start <- target_pos - window_bp
  w_end   <- target_pos + window_bp
  
  # --- B. Recherche des voisins (LOGIQUE UI EXACTE) ---
  # UI Logic: filter(CHR_Clean == ..., MAPINFO >= ..., MAPINFO <= ...)
  neighbors <- probe_features %>%
    filter(CHR_Clean == target_chr, 
           MAPINFO >= w_start, 
           MAPINFO <= w_end) %>%
    arrange(MAPINFO)
  
  # --- C. Intersection avec Beta ---
  # On vérifie quels voisins existent dans la matrice Beta
  valid_ids <- intersect(neighbors$CpG, rownames(beta_matrix))
  
  if(length(valid_ids) == 0) next
  
  # --- D. Préparation des données (Pivot Longer) ---
  plot_data <- as.data.frame(beta_matrix[valid_ids, , drop=FALSE])
  plot_data$CpG <- rownames(plot_data)
  
  # Ajout de la position (depuis neighbors pour être sûr)
  plot_data$Pos <- neighbors$MAPINFO[match(plot_data$CpG, neighbors$CpG)]
  
  # Pivot : Format long pour afficher chaque sample individuellement
  long_data <- pivot_longer(plot_data, cols = -c(CpG, Pos), names_to = "Sample", values_to = "Beta")
  
  # Ajout des groupes (Pheno)
  if(!is.null(pheno) && length(pheno) == ncol(beta_matrix)) {
    sample_map <- data.frame(Sample = colnames(beta_matrix), Group = as.factor(pheno), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    long_data <- left_join(long_data, sample_map, by="Sample")
  } else { 
    long_data$Group <- "All" 
  }
  
  # --- E. Graphique (Même code que UI) ---
  suppressWarnings({
    p <- ggplot(long_data, aes(x=Pos, y=Beta)) +
         # Points individuels (Samples)
         geom_point(aes(color=Group,
                        text = paste0("Sample: ", Sample,
                                      "<br>Group: ", Group,
                                      "<br>CpG: ", CpG,
                                      "<br>Pos: ", format(Pos, big.mark=","),
                                      "<br>Beta: ", round(Beta, 3))),
                    alpha=0.6, size=1.5) +
         
         # Courbe Loess par groupe
         geom_smooth(aes(color=Group, fill=Group), method="loess", formula = y ~ x, alpha=0.2) +
         
         # Ligne verticale cible
         geom_vline(xintercept = target_pos, linetype="dashed", color="black") +
         
         # Mise en page
         scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy=1), limits=c(0, 1.1)) +
         scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
         
         # Force l'axe X à montrer toute la fenêtre 5kb
         coord_cartesian(xlim = c(w_start, w_end)) +
         
         labs(title = paste0(target_id, " (", target_gene, ")"),
              subtitle = paste0("Region: chr", target_chr, ":", format(w_start, big.mark=","), "-", format(w_end, big.mark=",")),
              x = "Genomic Position (bp)", y = "Methylation %") +
         
         theme_minimal() +
         scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") + 
         scale_fill_brewer(palette="Set1")
    
    # Interactivité Plotly
    p_ly <- ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") %>% 
      layout(margin = list(b = 50, t = 50))
    
    # Stockage dans la liste
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- htmltools::tags$h3(paste0(i, ". ", target_id))
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_ly
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- htmltools::tags$hr()
  })
}

# Rendu final de la liste
htmltools::tagList(plot_list)
```

```{r}
get_multi_window_plots <- function(target_ids, beta, pheno, probe_features, window_bp = 5000) {
  
  # --- 1. Préparation globale ---
  # On nettoie l'annotation une seule fois pour gagner du temps
  # Force MAPINFO en numérique
  if("MAPINFO" %in% colnames(probe_features)) {
    probe_features$MAPINFO <- as.numeric(as.character(probe_features$MAPINFO))
  }
  
  # Force CHR sans "chr"
  chr_col <- grep("CHR", colnames(probe_features), ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)[1]
  if(!is.na(chr_col)) {
    probe_features$CHR_Clean <- gsub("chr", "", as.character(probe_features[[chr_col]]), ignore.case = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Si CpG n'est pas une colonne, on la crée depuis les rownames
  if(!"CpG" %in% colnames(probe_features)) {
    probe_features$CpG <- rownames(probe_features)
  }

  # --- 2. Boucle sur les CpGs (lapply) ---
  plot_list <- lapply(target_ids, function(target_id) {
    
    # Gestion d'erreur pour ne pas casser la boucle si un CpG est invalide
    tryCatch({
      
      # A. Vérif existence
      sel_info <- probe_features[probe_features$CpG == target_id, ]
      if(nrow(sel_info) == 0) {
        warning(paste("CpG non trouvé:", target_id))
        return(NULL)
      }
      
      # B. Infos Cible
      target_chr <- sel_info$CHR_Clean[1]
      target_pos <- sel_info$MAPINFO[1]
      target_gene <- if("gene" %in% colnames(sel_info)) sel_info$gene[1] else ""
      
      w_start <- target_pos - window_bp
      w_end   <- target_pos + window_bp
      
      # C. Recherche Voisins (Logique stricte UI)
      neighbors <- probe_features %>%
        filter(CHR_Clean == target_chr, 
               MAPINFO >= w_start, 
               MAPINFO <= w_end)
      
      valid_ids <- intersect(neighbors$CpG, rownames(beta))
      
      if(length(valid_ids) == 0) return(NULL)
      
      # D. Préparation Données Plot
      plot_data <- as.data.frame(beta[valid_ids, , drop=FALSE])
      plot_data$CpG <- rownames(plot_data)
      plot_data$Pos <- neighbors$MAPINFO[match(plot_data$CpG, neighbors$CpG)]
      
      # Pivot format Long
      long_data <- pivot_longer(plot_data, cols = -c(CpG, Pos), names_to = "Sample", values_to = "Beta")
      
      # Ajout Groupes
      if(!is.null(pheno) && length(pheno) == ncol(beta)) {
        sample_map <- data.frame(Sample = colnames(beta), Group = as.factor(pheno), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
        long_data <- left_join(long_data, sample_map, by="Sample")
      } else { 
        long_data$Group <- "All" 
      }
      
      # E. Graphique
      # suppressWarnings pour éviter le spam console sur le Loess
      suppressWarnings({
        p <- ggplot(long_data, aes(x=Pos, y=Beta)) +
          geom_point(aes(color=Group,
                         text = paste0("Sample: ", Sample,
                                       "<br>CpG: ", CpG,
                                       "<br>Pos: ", format(Pos, big.mark=","),
                                       "<br>Beta: ", round(Beta, 3))),
                     alpha=0.6, size=1.5) +
          geom_smooth(aes(color=Group, fill=Group), method="loess", formula = y ~ x, alpha=0.2) +
          geom_vline(xintercept = target_pos, linetype="dashed", color="black") +
          scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy=1), limits=c(0, 1.1)) +
          scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
          # Force l'affichage de toute la fenêtre
          coord_cartesian(xlim = c(w_start, w_end)) +
          labs(title = paste0(target_id, " (", target_gene, ")"),
               subtitle = paste0("Region: chr", target_chr, ":", format(w_start, big.mark=","), "-", format(w_end, big.mark=",")),
               x = "Genomic Position (bp)", y = "Methylation %") +
          theme_minimal() +
          scale_color_brewer(palette="Set1") + 
          scale_fill_brewer(palette="Set1")
        
        # Retourne l'objet Plotly
        return(ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text"))
      })
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning(paste("Erreur pour", target_id, ":", e$message))
      return(NULL)
    })
  })
  
  # Nommer la liste avec les IDs des CpG pour accès facile
  names(plot_list) <- target_ids
  
  # Retirer les éléments NULL (ceux qui ont échoué)
  plot_list <- plot_list[!sapply(plot_list, is.null)]
  
  return(plot_list)
}
```


---

## Session Info

```{r session_info}
sessionInfo()
```
